chunks.title: uniond-release v1.2.2-s1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: unionlabs/union
Release: uniond-release v1.2.2-s1
Tag: uniond/v1.2.2.SECURITY.1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-01-20T13:40:49Z; created_at: 2025-08-13T23:56:22Z
Release notes:
# sha256 Checksums
## x86_64-linux (amd64)
`be47443739c1bbbee505f9fd8f586cf159b26908c97af48275e6e14268386a6d`
## aarch64-linux (arm64)
`9d0a05308ba0caeead5788ce09980b22916a05a290e2de6ccbe7767fb67c7c4c`
# Instructions
This binary release can be done asynchronously and does not require a synchronized update.
To conduct the upgrade:
- halt your existing `uniond` service
- replace the binary on your system with one of the appropriate architecture
- restart the `uniond` service
Please upgrade your `uniond` service ASAP.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the unionlabs/union release uniond-release v1.2.2-s1, the release note provides sha256 checksums for x86_64-linux and aarch64-linux binaries, and includes instructions for an asynchronous binary upgrade, advising users to halt the uniond service, replace the binary, and restart the service as soon as possible.

questions.query_text: In the unionlabs/union releases, which release note includes instructions for an asynchronous binary upgrade, advising users to halt the uniond service, replace the binary, and restart the service?

answer_support.answer_text: includes instructions for an asynchronous binary upgrade, advising users to halt the uniond service, replace the binary, and restart the service as soon as possible.

questions.query_text: Across the unionlabs/union releases, how does the content of the release note for uniond-release v1.2.2-s1 differ from the release note for uniond-release v1.2.2?

options.text: v1.2.2-s1 includes upgrade instructions and a security advisory, while v1.2.2 only provides sha256 checksums.
v1.2.2-s1 provides checksums for tar.gz bundles, while v1.2.2 provides checksums for binaries.
v1.2.2-s1 is a stable release, while v1.2.2 is a pre-release.
v1.2.2-s1 includes a new feature list, while v1.2.2 only contains bug fixes.

questions.expected_answer: v1.2.2-s1 includes upgrade instructions and a security advisory, while v1.2.2 only provides sha256 checksums.

answer_support.answer_text: includes instructions for an asynchronous binary upgrade, advising users to halt the uniond service, replace the binary, and restart the service as soon as possible.
provides sha256 checksums for the x86_64-linux and aarch64-linux binaries.

questions.query_text: In the unionlabs/union release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release note that provides sha256 checksums for uniond-release v1.2.2 binaries, (2) a release note that provides sha256 checksums for uniond-release v1.2.2-s1 binaries and includes upgrade instructions, (3) a release note that provides sha256 checksums for uniond-release v1.2.3 binaries.

answer_support.answer_text: provides sha256 checksums for the x86_64-linux and aarch64-linux binaries.
provides sha256 checksums for x86_64-linux and aarch64-linux binaries, and includes instructions for an asynchronous binary upgrade.
provides sha256 checksums for the x86_64-linux and aarch64-linux binaries.
